title: Speaking - Part 2
description: Look at the photograph and say what you can see.

tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people practising for a concert. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: A
images.description: A group of children are practising music on a small stage. One child is playing the violin and two others are playing flutes while a teacher watches them. There are music stands and chairs around them.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.

tasks.topic: Taking a pet to the vet
tasks.instructions: Here is your photograph. It shows people taking a pet to the vet. Please tell us what you can see in the photograph.

images.label: B
images.description: A young woman and a vet are looking at a small dog in a veterinary clinic. The dog is sitting on a table while the vet checks it carefully. There are animal pictures and medical equipment in the room.

followUp.question: Talk about the people. Talk about the place. Talk about other things in the photograph.
